name: CLIENT: VoomLux — B2B outreach drip (3 emails)

parameters.content:
## VoomLux B2B campaign drip
Feed it one prospect (company, first_name, email) and it runs a 3-touch outreach sequence automatically:

• Day 0 — intro
• Day 3 — follow-up
• Day 7 — polite breakup

### How to feed it
Use the **B2B Campaign** button in TB Command → Client Leads (it posts here), or POST to this webhook:
company, first_name, email

### Setup
1. Attach your email credential on the 3 Email nodes.
2. Emails send from the connected mailbox — for best results connect a VoomLux mailbox (or add 'on behalf of VoomLux' stays in the copy).
3. Save → **Active**.

⚠️ Keep lists small + relevant (hotels, venues, planners, offices). Cold email works when it's personal, not bulk.

parameters.subject: =A reliable black-car partner for {{ $json.body.company }}
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.body.first_name }},

Quick intro — I'm with VoomLux, a luxury black-car and transport service. We partner with a small number of businesses like {{ $json.body.company }} that need guest and executive transport handled flawlessly:

• Priority dispatch for partner accounts — never waiting on a car
• Professional chauffeurs, immaculate vehicles, on time
• One clean monthly invoice instead of per-ride receipts
• A direct line to someone who knows your account

Would it be worth a quick call to see if we'd be a fit for {{ $json.body.company }}? Happy to set up a complimentary first ride so you can judge the service yourself.

Best,
The VoomLux Team
voomlux.com

parameters.subject: =Re: black-car partner for {{ $json.body.company }}
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.body.first_name }},

Floating this back up — I know transport is one of those things nobody thinks about until a car is late with a client in it.

The short version of what partners get with VoomLux: priority dispatch, chauffeurs you'd trust with your best client, and one monthly invoice.

If there's a better person at {{ $json.body.company }} to talk to about guest or executive travel, point me their way and I'll keep it brief.

Best,
The VoomLux Team

parameters.subject: =Closing the loop — {{ $json.body.company }}
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.body.first_name }},

I'll take the hint and close this out 🙂

If guest or executive transport ever becomes a headache at {{ $json.body.company }} — a late car, a no-show, a big event to move — keep us in your back pocket: voomlux.com. Partner accounts get priority dispatch and one monthly invoice.

Either way, wishing you a smooth season.

Best,
The VoomLux Team
